channel.title: SalahDin Rezk Blog
channel.description: Essays and technical writing from SalahDin Rezk.

item.title: VIM BRAIN
item.description: [An obscure little project](https://github.com/salastro/vimBrain) that I finished recently was to create an esoteric programming language. My goal was to achieve the smallest possible set of vim-like instructions while being Turing-complete.
